announcements.title: YDL job advertisement
announcements.content:
Dear YDL-User,

the YDL-Team is recruiting four workers with 25% working time (currently 9.85 hours per week).

Regards,
YDL-Team

announcements.title: Maintenance
announcements.content:
Dear YDL-User,

on 28 March 2019 in the period from 13:30 to 18:00 maintenance work on YDL will take place.

Regards,
YDL-Team

announcements.title: Postponement of courses to the archive area
announcements.content:
Dear YDL-User,

we have moved all courses of the winter semester to the archive area, just like last semester.

Kind Regards,
YDL-Team
